content: Langfuse cloud free tier (Hobby plan): 50,000 billable units/month (1 unit = any trace event: trace, span, generation, score), 30-day data retention, 2 users, no credit card required. Python SDK: 'langfuse' v4.12.0 on PyPI. LangChain integration: from langfuse.langchain import CallbackHandler. SDK v4 breaking change: langfuse.decorators removed, use 'from langfuse import observe, get_client'. Native OpenTelemetry in v4. LangSmith free tier is only 5k traces/month vs Langfuse 50k. Self-hosting Langfuse requires Docker Compose (incompatible with Vercel serverless). Langfuse cloud free is the correct choice for this project.
